name: i18n-parity
description: Vendorable zero-dependency translation key-parity gate for multilingual next-intl apps — diffs locale catalogs (presence, empty values, ICU args, leaf shape, namespaces) with declarable waivers, wired as a hard CI/pre-push gate

interface.shortDescription: Vendorable zero-dependency translation key-parity gate for multilingual next-intl apps — diffs locale catalogs (presence, empty values, ICU args, leaf shape, namespaces) with declarable waivers, wired as a hard CI/pre-push gate
interface.longDescription: Vendorable zero-dependency translation key-parity gate for multilingual next-intl apps — diffs locale catalogs (presence, empty values, ICU args, leaf shape, namespaces) with declarable waivers, wired as a hard CI/pre-push gate
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the i18n-parity plugin for this task.
